svg.title: Global strategy real benchmark PASS, mobile layout
svg.desc: Direct blue versus Global green cohort totals. simple cohort totals saved 19.655% tokens and -4.309% first-result time; medium cohort totals saved 65.064% tokens and 32.755% first-result time; complex cohort totals saved 86.368% tokens and 31.854% first-result time. All 12 runs passed correctness and evidence gates.
svg.metadata: {"all_correct":true,"caveats":{"first_result":"First-result time ends when the completed result is first available. Post-result Ending Task Real Verify is excluded from user-visible return time and reported separately when present.","generalization":"This is a passing empirical cohort for these frozen workloads and conditions, not a universal guarantee for every task or future runtime.","tokens":"Logical task tokens sum censused foreground root and descendant sessions through the first result, include cached input, and exclude post-result Ending/verification sessions.
